title: goodenia racemosa var. latifolia
intro: Goodenia racemosa var. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved goodenia, is a variety of the Goodenia racemosa plant species, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia racemosa var. latifolia include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
